title: Multi-Level Board Subitem Automations

posts.author: masonmay (Mason May)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Multi-Level Boards are great, but desperately need support for subitem automation.

It would be nice if you could natively in Monday automations create your own automations to add tiers of subitems, but currently it is not really possible.

App developers are also late to the game in adding this functionality making Multi-Level Boards this hidden gem that is kind of useless because you can’t automate it to what you need it to be.

What are you trying to achieve

Create subitem templates to easily apply and automate to multi-level board items.
